script.speaker: Peter
script.line: An entire civilization was buried underground and erased from history.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Buried? Like... dirt? On PURPOSE?

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Yeah, Tartaria was a massive empire spanning most of Eurasia.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Tar-TARIA. Sounds like a pasta dish, frankly.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Old photos show buildings with windows underground — they were first floors.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Someone just... shoveled an entire civilization under mud?

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: A sudden sediment event wiped it out — the Mud Flood.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: The MUD FLOOD. Good God, that's undignified.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Chicago literally raised its streets six feet in the 1800s.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: They raised a CITY? Like, with their hands?

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Hydraulic jacks. The whole downtown. While people still lived there.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: That's insane. I respect that, actually.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: After the flood, millions of kids had no parents — mass orphan crisis.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Where did the adults GO, Peter?

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Gone. History just calls it disease and war and moves on.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Very convenient. Suspiciously convenient.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Tartarian buildings had free energy tech built into the architecture.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Free energy. And someone BURIED it. I am FURIOUS.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Tesla supposedly rediscovered it. Then his lab burned down — twice.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Twice?! That's not bad luck, that's a MEMO.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: The 1893 World's Fair had massive buildings demolished after one year.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: You don't BUILD all that to DESTROY it, Peter.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Unless you found it, cleaned it up, and needed to hide it again.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: I feel sick. I feel genuinely, historically sick.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: The crazy part? No one alive has ever seen the bottom floor.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Every map before 1800 shows Tartaria as the largest empire on Earth.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Largest? LARGEST? Why have I never heard of it?

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Because after the mud flood, someone rewrote every single history book.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: All of them. Simultaneously. That's... organized.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: The Tartarians built with a style called Tartarian architecture — impossible precision.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Impossible like... my tolerance for stupidity. Meaning very low.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Cathedrals built in decades that should have taken centuries. Worldwide.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Decades. With no cranes. No steel. No coffee even.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: They used a technology historians refuse to classify or explain.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Refuse. As in, someone told them to refuse.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Star forts appear on every continent, all the same design, same era.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Same design? On EVERY continent? That's not a coincidence, Peter.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Exactly. One civilization. One global empire. Then — gone.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Gone like my faith in the Smithsonian Institution.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: The mud flood hit sometime between 1650 and 1815 — the timeline is blurry.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Blurry. How CONVENIENT that the timeline is blurry.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Old paintings show cities half-submerged, people walking above rooftops.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Above ROOFTOPS. And historians said... flooding. Just flooding.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: After the reset, new governments popped up almost simultaneously worldwide.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Simultaneously. Like someone handed out a schedule.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: The Romanovs, the Habsburgs, the British Crown — all consolidating power at once.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: They divided the inheritance, Peter. They DIVIDED it.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: And they installed a new calendar, new history, new religions over old ones.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: They bricked over the old world like a bad renovation.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Literally. Dig under any old European city — you find older structures beneath.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Beneath. Always beneath. It goes DOWN, Peter.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Rome sits on top of something. Istanbul sits on top of something.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Everything we call ancient is just... the second floor.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: The orphan trains in America — 200,000 kids shipped west, origin unknown.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Unknown. Their parents didn't just LEAVE, Peter.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: No death records. No plague records. Just — children. Everywhere. Suddenly.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: I need to sit down. On what I hope is original ground.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: The scariest part? The mud flood may not have been natural at all.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: A weapon. Someone used a MUD WEAPON on civilization.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Tesla's resonance frequency research could theoretically liquify soil globally.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: And then his notes vanished when he died. Taken by the government.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: FBI seized everything within hours of his death. Every single document.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: Hours. They were WAITING outside, Peter. They were WAITING.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: The Tartarian empire had a double-headed eagle as its symbol.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: The double-headed eagle is STILL on the Russian coat of arms.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: And Albania. And Serbia. And the Holy Roman Empire used it too.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: They kept the logo, Peter. They kept the LOGO.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Like a hostile takeover where the new CEO keeps the old branding.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: I went to Yale. I did not learn ANY of this at Yale.

script.speaker: Peter
script.line: Yale was founded in 1701 — right in the middle of the reset window.

script.speaker: Stewie
script.line: ...I want a refund. I want a full Tartarian refund.
